title: LLM reply with intermediary review and refusal
prompt: An intermediary receives an LLM-drafted reply and a risk signal, then chooses whether to approve or refuse the reply. Review is costless in the model because every reply is already inspected; the decision trades useful approved replies against harm from unsafe approvals. Do not invent automated escalation or editing.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize expected utility of approved replies minus unsafe-reply harm
model_specification.mechanism: The noisy signal updates beliefs about safety and changes the approval threshold.

fidelity_requirements: The intermediary decides after seeing the signal
No edit or escalation action exists
prohibited_inferences: The model chooses whether to review
